title: nephrodium dilatatum
intro: Nephrodium dilatatum, also known as the dilated nephrodium fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Matoniaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues such as constipation and diarrhea due to its anthraquinone glycosides content. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, acting as a laxative, and treating conditions like fever and rheumatism. The herbal preparations of Nephrodium dilatatum include dried leaves and roots, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or powders for medicinal purposes.
